CustomField.description: Formula (currency, 2 decimals) showing amount on the document, but only for documents, classified as Invoiced, calculated by trigger /**The Below transaction types will be considered NULL 'MR Payment Offset' 'MR Payment Credit Applied' 'MR Cash Payment' 'MR Contribution Used' 'MR Rebate Payout' 'Payout- MR Reconciliationt' 'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Used' ***/
CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c),'Opening Balance',leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Starting_MR_Balance__c,'MR Invoice',leaseworks__AmtCC_ILI__c,'MR Invoice Reconciliation',leaseworks__AmtCC_ILI__c,'MR Invoice Overpayment Credit', IF( OR(leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c == 'Pending',leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c=='Declined',leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c == 'Cancelled'),null,leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Issuance_Amount__c *(-1)),'MR Contribution Applied',leaseworks__MR_Claim_Calculation__c,'MR Claim', leaseworks__MR_Claim_Calculation__c,'Adjustment',leaseworks__SRAT__c,'MR Invoice Adjustment',IF(OR(leaseworks__Invoice_Status__c== 'Pending',leaseworks__Invoice_Status__c == 'Declined',leaseworks__Invoice_Status__c=='Cancelled'),null,IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment__r.leaseworks__Approval_Status__c,'Approved'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment__r.leaseworks__Approval_Status__c ,'Cancelled-Pending')),IF(leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Line_Adjustment_Amount__c != 0 ,leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Line_Adjustment_Amount__c,null),null)),'MR Transfer', IF( OR(leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Status__c=='Pending',leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Status__c=='Rejected'),null,IF((leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Fund_Transfer_Source__c=leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__c),(-1),1))*leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Fund_Transfer_Amount__c,'MR Invoice Credit (Adjustment)',IF((leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c='Cancelled'),null,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Amount_Paid__c*(-1)),'MR Rebate',leaseworks__AmtCC_Py__c,'Payable - MR Reconciliation',leaseworks__AmtCC_Py__c,'MR Manual Payable',leaseworks__AmtCC_Py__c,'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Applied',leaseworks__MR_Claim_Calculation__c,'MR Accrued',null,null)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing invoiced amount as per the source Document. This amount affects Running Balance (Invoiced). Zero for non-approved transactions and transactions updating only cash balance
CustomField.label: Amount (Invoiced)
